Name: IMF.P.Security.SetDimensionAccess
Purpose: Apply or log a single dimension-security assignment for an IMF group.

Parameters.Name: pUseBedrock
Parameters.Description: Delegate generic object-security mechanics to Bedrock when Y.

Parameters.Name: pBedrockProcess
Parameters.Description: Bedrock or wrapper process used for dimension-security assignment.

Parameters.Name: pStrictBedrock
Parameters.Description: Stop if Bedrock security delegation is requested but unavailable.
